summary: All 8 required criteria pass. Build/typecheck/full suite (2258 tests/189 files) clean. Consent gate fail-closed, audit O_APPEND+chmod(0600) PHI-free, versioned disclaimer footer present in both paths. Two non-blocking quality findings: hollow downstream spies (fix in S3) and an ad-hoc wall-clock fallback (fix in S6).
